message:
perf(ui): disable ambient animated background layers

Client shell:
- Remove the fixed ambient background animation layers (MemoryDump canvas + SpectralBackground scanlines).
- Keeps the rest of the UI/motion intact while eliminating the always-on animated background the user disliked.

Notes:
- No files deleted; components remain available for future re-enable if desired.
- Build/typecheck/lint remain clean (lint warnings unchanged).
